title: CLI
description: Look up every published you-agent-factory CLI command from the installed package CLI contract on a stable static docs route.
openingSummary: This reference lists every published CLI command from the installed @you-agent-factory/api CLI contract so integrators can look up command paths, help text, and examples without a live Factory host.

whatItCovers.title: What It Covers
whatItCovers.body: This reference publishes the package-backed CLI command inventory for you-agent-factory. Readers can look up every published command path from the installed CLI contract, including available descriptions, examples, stable anchors, and inventory filters.

keyConcepts.title: Key Concepts
keyConcepts.body: A CLI command path is the full published invocation string, such as you config init. The inventory comes from the installed @you-agent-factory/api/cli public export, not from a page-local copy of commands. Structured flags and arguments are not published yet on command cards; the Flags and arguments area marks that surface as under construction instead of inventing option rows.

commandInventory.title: Command Inventory
commandInventory.body: Scan the published CLI commands below. Filter by command path, alias, description, lifecycle, or visibility when those facets are present on a command. Open a command card for its description and example, and copy its stable anchor when you need a deep link.
